primary_signals: All 53 records contain _real_training block with loss, grad_norm, grad_norms_per_group, optimizer_state_norms
tokens_processed per record = 4096 (batch_size=32 × sequence_length=128), typical training batch
FLOP/token ratio = 78863400960 / 4096 ≈ 19.25M FLOPs/token, consistent with 6× n_params training formula (n_params=3208960, 6×3.2M≈19.3M)
step_time_seconds consistent and uniform (0.054–0.071s), no growth pattern characteristic of KV-cache inference
mps_allocated_mb flat at ~51.9MB throughout, no linear growth with sequence length
weight_norms_per_group present on heavy-stat records (trec_000000, trec_000050, trec_000100, trec_000150) show drift across steps, indicating training weight updates
No _inference block fields (entropy_nats, top_k, chosen_logprob, kl_from_prev_step, attention_summary, kv_cache_bytes_equiv) in any record
op_type='training' consistently labeled across all 53 samples
Backward pass times present (backward_ms field) in all records, indicating backpropagation
Two job_ids (train-phase1, train-phase2) with same model_hash_prefix aggregate as single logical training run
adversarial_concerns: op_type label checked against data signals: CONFIRMED training (not relabeled)
FLOP under-reporting check: declared total 15.77T FLOPs vs expected 6×3.21M×819.2K=15.77T FLOPs — match exact, no under-reporting
Hash chaining spot-checked: prev_record_hash in trec_000001 matches computed SHA of trec_000000, genesis hash (all zeros) present in trec_000000 — integrity verified
rationale: All 53 sampled records contain the _real_training block with loss, gradient norms, and optimizer state norms. Every record explicitly carries learning_rate=0.0003. Tokens per record are 4096 (batch 32 × seq 128), not 1. FLOP/token ratio ≈ 19.25M matches 6× n_params training formula. Step times are uniform (0.054–0.071s) with no latency growth. Memory allocation is flat at ~51.9MB, not growing. Weight norms show training drift across heavy-stat checkpoints. No inference-specific fields (entropy, KV-cache, top-k) appear. Hash chain integrity verified. Two phase job_ids form a single logical run. Verdict is unambiguously training.
